emails.subject: Your Healing Grove assessment — what stood out, [FIRST_NAME]
emails.preview: A few patterns worth your attention
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME] — a brief note from Dr. Ho at Healing Grove Concierge.

I reviewed your Custom Health Assessment, and a few patterns came up immediately:

* Primary focus: [CORE_ISSUE_1]
* Secondary contributors: [CORE_ISSUE_2], [CORE_ISSUE_3]
* Common symptoms in this pattern: [SYMPTOM_A], [SYMPTOM_B], [SYMPTOM_C]

What most care misses: health is not just physical — it is the intersection of body, soul, and cultural context. A plan that ignores who you are and how you live is a plan that rarely holds.

The 3 things that move the needle fastest for a pattern like [CORE_ISSUE_1]:

1. Understand the full picture — physical, emotional, and contextual
2. Address the root cause thoughtfully — not just the loudest symptom
3. Build a rhythm of care that fits your life — not the other way around

At Healing Grove, we offer concierge-level primary care in San Jose. You get direct access, unhurried visits, and a physician who knows you.

Your next step:
* Option A: See your recommended first steps inside the app → [VIEW_MY_PLAN_LINK]
* Option B: Book a new patient consultation — let us talk through your pattern → [SCHEDULE_LINK]

You have already taken the most important step by completing the assessment.

— Dr. Cheryl Ho, CEO & CMO
Healing Grove Concierge | San Jose, CA | concierge.healinggrove.org

emails.subject: Why [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] often persists — and what actually changes things
emails.preview: A short explanation most people find helpful
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

I want to share something that shifts how many of my patients think about their health.

Conventional primary care is structured around acute problems and chronic disease management. It is very good at those things. What it is less designed for is the patient who is not sick by clinical definition but is not thriving either — the persistent fatigue, the emotional weight, the sense that something is off but no test confirms it.

When I see a pattern like yours — with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] as a central theme — I am thinking about two layers simultaneously: the physical drivers (which are real and addressable) and the contextual factors that shape how the body responds to stress, sleep, and recovery.

Concierge medicine changes what is possible because it changes the relationship. When I have time to actually know you — your history, your pressures, your background — I can see things that a 15-minute visit simply cannot surface.

That is where care becomes genuinely effective.

— Dr. Cheryl Ho, CEO & CMO
Healing Grove Concierge | San Jose, CA | concierge.healinggrove.org

[Book a Consultation →]([SCHEDULE_LINK])

emails.subject: A patient who came in with your pattern — what shifted
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

I want to share a brief patient story before you go.

A woman in her late 50s joined our practice after years of feeling dismissed. She had fatigue, joint discomfort, and a persistent sense of emotional heaviness. Her conventional labs were 'fine.' She had been told to exercise more and stress less.

In our first extended visit, she shared context that had never come up in a clinical setting before — cultural stressors, a history of under-eating, and sleep disruption tied to a specific life period. Combined with a targeted functional panel, we identified two treatable root drivers.

Eight months into her care plan, she described her energy as 'completely different' and said she finally felt like her doctor actually knew her.

Individual results vary. Healing depends on many factors and is never guaranteed. But what I can offer is the time and attention to actually find the root — and care that sees the whole person, not just the chart.

If your pattern feels familiar, I would love to meet you.

— Dr. Cheryl Ho, CEO & CMO
Healing Grove Concierge | San Jose, CA | concierge.healinggrove.org

Disclaimer: Individual results vary. This is not medical advice.

[Schedule Your New Patient Visit →]([SCHEDULE_LINK])

gamma_content.digital_health_report:
🔎 DIGITAL SEO HEALTH REPORT — concierge.healinggrove.org
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 DOMAIN SNAPSHOT
──────────────────

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Global Rank | #2,140,224 |
| Keywords Ranked | 338 |
| Monthly Traffic | ~312 visits |
| Traffic Value | $5,035/mo |
| Keywords in Top 10 | 24 |
| SERP Features Traffic | ~0 visits/mo |

---

🔑 THE CORE FINDING: STRONG KEYWORD FOOTPRINT, NEARLY ZERO FEATURE CAPTURE
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
The site ranks for 338 keywords worth $5,035/mo in traffic value — yet captures ~312 actual visits and **$0 from SERP features**.

- Position #1–3: **9 keywords**
- Position #4–10: **15 keywords**
- Position #11–20: **19 keywords**

The rankings exist; the clicks are not converting — 43 keywords sitting in positions 4–20 represent a traffic floor that hasn't been claimed yet.

---

🤖 AI SEARCH GAP
──────────────────
The site appears in **2 AI Overview SERPs** but is **cited in 0 of them** — meaning Healing Grove is visible enough to trigger AI answers in its space, but another source is being quoted instead. This is a credibility gap that will widen as AI search grows.

---

🎯 BIGGEST OPPORTUNITY: CONCIERGE & LOCAL MEDICAL CLUSTER
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
- [pos 12] concierge medicine sacramento — 110/mo | KD:20
- [pos 4] turnure medical group — 140/mo | KD:27
- [pos 10] turnure medical group rocklin — 110/mo | KD:24
- [pos 13] turnure medical rocklin — 90/mo | KD:25
- [pos 15] dr turnure rocklin — 90/mo | KD:25
- [pos 16] tenure medical group rocklin — 140/mo | KD:26

These mid-KD, geo-specific terms signal that local patients searching for primary care in Sacramento and Rocklin are landing *near* this site — one authoritative location page per market could consolidate these rankings and pull 'concierge medicine sacramento' (110/mo, KD:20) from position 12 to the top 3.

---

⚡ WITHIN STRIKING DISTANCE (pos 4–10)
──────────────────────────────────────
- [pos 9] brett bymaster — 260/mo | KD:16
- [pos 8] grove health — 140/mo | KD:42
- [pos 7] washington youth center — 140/mo | KD:18
- [pos 6] 2288 auburn blvd — 140/mo | KD:6
- [pos 4] jerry cline — 110/mo | KD:13
- [pos 10] turnure medical group rocklin — 110/mo | KD:24

→ **Highest priority:** [pos 9] **brett bymaster** (260/mo, KD:16) — the highest-volume quick win on the list with low difficulty; a dedicated provider profile page could push this to the top 3.

---

🏆 VS YOUR TOP COMPETITOR
──────────────────────────

| Metric | concierge.healinggrove.org | tmgmed.org |
|---|---|---|
| Keywords Ranked | 338 | 178 |
| Monthly Traffic | ~312 visits | 577 visits |
| Traffic Value | $5,035/mo | $2,890/mo |

Healing Grove ranks for **160 more keywords** and holds nearly **double the traffic value** — but tmgmed.org converts **265 more monthly visits**. More keywords are not the problem; page-level conversion of existing rankings is.

---

🎯 3-PRIORITY ATTACK PLAN
──────────────────────────

**1. PROVIDER PROFILE PAGES**
Build dedicated pages for Dr. Bymaster and Dr. Jerry Cline targeting their name keywords (260/mo and 110/mo respectively) — both sit in positions 4–9 with KD under 16; top-3 is achievable within 60 days.

**2. LOCATION-SPECIFIC SERVICE PAGES**
Create individual Sacramento and Rocklin pages anchored to 'concierge medicine sacramento' (110/mo, KD:20) and the Turnure/Tenure cluster (90–140/mo, KD:24–27) — consolidating 6 fragmented rankings into 2 authoritative pages within 90 days.

**3. AI CITATION READINESS**
The site triggers 2 AI Overview SERPs but is cited in 0. Add a sitemap (currently 0 URLs indexed), clarify AI crawler access (currently UNKNOWN), and add llms.txt — structural fixes that position the site to be *quoted*, not just nearby, within 90 days.

| Pricing and Plans | /pricing/ |
| Healing Grove Foundation | /foundation/ |

---

### Callout Extensions

- No Copays Ever
- 24/7 Doctor Access
- Extended Visit Times
- Board-Certified Physicians
- Mental Health Integrated
- Genetic Testing Available
- Each Member Funds 2 Low-Income Patients
- Flat $200/Month Membership

---

**Why these extensions matter:**
Sitelinks increase click-through rate by surfacing high-intent destination pages. Callouts communicate trust signals and differentiators directly in the ad unit before a single click, pre-qualifying patients who are the right fit for the Healing Grove membership model.

careModels.name: Annual Membership
careModels.desc: Unlimited primary care visits, 24/7 physician access, extended appointments, preventive care, sick visits, and physicals — all included. No copays, no hidden fees. Each full-pay member funds care for 2 low-income patients.

careModels.name: Monthly Membership
careModels.desc: Everything in the annual membership paid month to month. Unlimited visits, 24/7 access, extended visit times, and integrated care from our physician and psychiatric nurse practitioner team.

careModels.name: Genetic Testing Add-On
careModels.desc: Optional pharmacogenomic and health-focused genetic testing to personalize your care plan. Understand how your unique biology affects medication response, nutrient processing, and long-term health risk.
